The two pilots have died and over 40 passengers went rushed to the hospital with injuries. The incident grounded all traffic at the airport, which then closed down.

description:
Israel executed more than 7,600 strikes on Iran by March 13, targeting nuclear-linked facilities, missile launchers, drone infrastructure, and military sites, according to the Israel Defense Forces. Israel continues conducting roughly 150–200 strikes per day as Iran continues launching ballistic missiles and drones toward Israel and the Gulf countries.

title: Middle East war live: Iran threatens to deploy 'naval mines' in Gulf if US, Israel attack its coasts
description: Iran on Monday threatened to deploy naval mines across the Gulf if the United States or Israel attacked its coasts or islands, warning key shipping routes could be targeted. The announcement comes as Tehran on Monday faces a deadline set by US President Donald Trump to open up the crucial Strait of Hormuz or face a major US assault on power plants. Follow our liveblog for all the latest updates.

title: Global economy under 'major' threat as Middle East war carries on
description: The International Energy Agency warned that the US-Israeli war on Iran could trigger the worst energy crisis the world has ever seen. The warning comes after Iran on the weekend vowed to escalate its attacks on energy infrastructure across the Gulf region, following President Trump's 48-hour ultimatum threatening to obliterate Iran's power infrastructure if Tehran doesn't fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

title: French left wins over country's largest cities in municipal election
description: Franc has brought in its new generation of mayors, in a local election that was held with the 2027 presidential election in mind. The left succeeded in major cities including Paris, Lyon and Marseille but failed to conquer Toulouse. On the other hand, Nice swung to the far right.

title: Israel strikes key bridge in south Lebanon, stoking fears of ground invasion
description: Israeli forces destroyed bridges they said were used by Hezbollah to cross the key Litani river, north of the border. The attack has sparked concern that a large-scale Israeli ground invasion could be in the works, with the Lebanese president calling the bombing 'collective punishment' and 'a flagrant violation of sovereignty'. FRANCE 24's Claire Paccalin tells us more from one of the destroyed bridges in Qâsmiyé.

description: Israel's Benjamin Netanyahu says Israel along with the United States will respond with "great force" after Iran's overnight strikes on two cities in southern Israel, near a highly sensitive Israeli nuclear facility. title: Earth heat hits record in 2025 as UN warns warming will last thousands of years
description: Earth’s heat-trapping levels hit a record in 2025, with impacts expected to persist for thousands of years, the United Nations warned on Monday. The World Meteorological Organisation said the 11 warmest years on record occurred between 2015 and 2025, underscoring global warming in its State of the Global Climate report.

title: Live: Iran faces Trump Hormuz ultimatum, IEA warns of worst global energy crisis in decades
description: Iran on Monday faces a deadline by President Donald Trump to open up the crucial Strait of Hormuz or face a major US assault on power plants, as Israel warned of weeks more of war. The International Energy Agency said the crisis is more severe than the 1970s oil shocks combined. Follow our liveblog for all the latest updates.

description: Pierre-Édouard Stérin is financing projects to make France less Muslim, more Catholic and more capitalist. He says his program has trained thousands running for municipal office on Sunday.

title: Экс-глава НКЦ США назвал возможную отправку войск на остров Харк "катастрофой"
description: Возможная отправка американских войск на остров Харк станет катастрофой для США, заявил в интервью The Washington Post бывший директор Национального контртеррористического центра (НКЦ) Джо Кент."Я просто думаю, что это будет катастрофой. (…) По сути, это означало бы предоставление Ирану группы заложников на острове, который они могли бы обстреливать беспилотниками и ракетами", - считает Кент.

title: Shabaab celebrates October attack on Mogadishu prison in new video
description:
Shabaab, Al Qaeda’s branch in East Africa, highlighted last year’s brazen assault on Mogadishu’s Godka Jilacow prison, operated by Somalia’s National Intelligence and Security Agency. In the video, one of the attackers was identified as the son of Ali Mohamed Rage, the group’s top spokesman. 
The post Shabaab celebrates October attack on Mogadishu prison in new video appeared first on FDDs Long War Journal.

title: Pakistan T20 cricket league to be held in empty stadiums amid oil crisis
description: Pakistan Super League will be held on schedule from March 26, but without the crowds and only at two venues.

title: Did Israel miscalculate Iranian military capabilities?
description: Iranian attacks on Arad and Dimona near Israeli nuclear site raise serious questions about Israels defence strategy.

title: The Gaza Tribunal: A question of complicity
description: What role has the UK played in Israel’s war on Gaza? We meet those who say it’s complicit in atrocities committed there.

title: Iran claims missile attacks on key Israeli military bases
description: Iran says it launched multiple ballistic missile and drone strikes, targeting bases across Israel, UAE, and Kuwait.

title: Moment Israeli strike hits bridge in southern Lebanon
description: Video shows the moment Israeli jets strike the Qasmiyeh Bridge over the Litani River in southern Lebanon.

title: Patriarch Filaret Dies at 97, Orthodox Church of Ukraine Says
description: Filaret led a movement in Ukraine that created a schism among Orthodox believers and, ultimately, a church independent of Moscow.

title: Iranian strike in southern town near nuclear facility rocks residents’ sense of security
description:
Dimona locals shocked but resilient after air defenses' failure to intercept missile leads to widespread damage and dozens of wounded
The post Iranian strike in southern town near nuclear facility rocks residents sense of security appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: "He needs to go": Fetterman's fellow Democrats rage over his vote on Mullin for DHS
description: Sen. John Fetterman (D-Pa.) is under heavy fire from fellow Democrats for casting the deciding vote to advance Sen. Markwayne Mullin's (R-Okla.) nomination for DHS secretary, with some openly calling for his ouster.Why it matters: The idea of trying to unseat Fetterman is never far from many Democrats' minds, but rarely has it been discussed so explicitly and so openly."Once again Sen Fetterman shows why he is Trump's favorite Democrat. title: Italian Eurofighters Intercept Russian Su-30 That Violated Estonian Airspace Over the Baltic Sea
description: The Italian Air Force jets, deployed to Estonia to support NATO Baltic Air Policing mission, intercepted and escorted the Russian Navy Su-30SM. On Mar. 18, 2026, a Russian Navy Su-30SM multirole fighter entered Estonian airspace, which extends 12 NM (Nautical Miles) offshore from Estonia’s sovereign territory. title: U.S. F-35 Makes Emergency Landing After Allegedly Being Hit by Iranian Fire – Reports
description: CENTCOM says a U.S. F-35 made an emergency landing at a U.S. air base in the Middle East after it “was struck by what is believed to be Iranian fire,” according to sources quoted by CNN. A U.S. F-35 Lightning II fighter jet was forced to make an emergency landing at a U.S. air base []

title: Iranian authorities taunt US, Israel, EU amid strikes and assassinations
description: Iranians are concerned about the impact of potential attacks on power plants as the scope of US-Israel war expands.

title: Attack on a Sudan Hospital Kills Dozens, Head of W.H.O. Says
description: The group’s director general said 13 children were killed in the latest violence in the Darfur region, and he decried the targeting of health care facilities in the civil war.

title: Rebuilding Gaza-with Dr. David Hasan - Sponsored Content
description:
Dr. David Hasan joins The Long Path to discuss neurosurgery, the impact of Oct 7, and founding the Gaza Children’s Village to support war-affected kids. Powered by Z3.
The post Rebuilding Gaza-with Dr. David Hasan appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: Iranian-backed militias escalate attacks in Iraq, send mixed signals on next steps
description:
Iranian-backed militias have continued conducting attacks across Iraq, recently targeting US and foreign diplomatic sites in Baghdad and Erbil. Hundreds of strikes have hit the Kurdistan Region since late February, wounding Peshmerga forces and damaging key locations. While Kataib Hezbollah signaled a possible temporary pause in attacks tied to specific demands on March 18, other groups, such as Kataib Sayyid al Shuhada, vowed to continue.
